item.title: Quick Farm Moment
item.description: A short glimpse into daily farm life capturing a simple, unexpected, or routine moment during ongoing agricultural work.

media:content.media:title: Quick Farm Moment
media:content.media:description: A short glimpse into daily farm life capturing a simple, unexpected, or routine moment during ongoing agricultural work.

item.title: Farming Like the Good Old Days
item.description: A look at traditional farming methods compared to modern agriculture, exploring how tools, labor, and efficiency have changed over time.

media:content.media:title: Farming Like the Good Old Days
media:content.media:description: A look at traditional farming methods compared to modern agriculture, exploring how tools, labor, and efficiency have changed over time.

item.title: A Busy Day on the Farm
item.description: A large group working together on the farm, showing teamwork, coordination, and the scale of modern agricultural operations.

media:content.media:title: A Busy Day on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A large group working together on the farm, showing teamwork, coordination, and the scale of modern agricultural operations.

item.title: How We Do Farming Work
item.description: An overview of daily farming operations, showing equipment use, fieldwork routines, and how tasks are managed on a modern farm.

media:content.media:title: How We Do Farming Work
media:content.media:description: An overview of daily farming operations, showing equipment use, fieldwork routines, and how tasks are managed on a modern farm.

item.title: New Tractor Unexpected Test
item.description: A new tractor faces an unplanned real-world test during farm work, revealing performance, durability, and early impressions in the field.

media:content.media:title: New Tractor Unexpected Test
media:content.media:description: A new tractor faces an unplanned real-world test during farm work, revealing performance, durability, and early impressions in the field.

item.title: A Tech-Savvy Farm Moment
item.description: A look at how modern technology is used on the farm, showcasing digital tools, equipment systems, and smart farming practices.

media:content.media:title: A Tech-Savvy Farm Moment
media:content.media:description: A look at how modern technology is used on the farm, showcasing digital tools, equipment systems, and smart farming practices.

item.title: A Tough Day in the Field
item.description: A challenging day of farm work in the field, showing difficult conditions, problem-solving, and the realities of agricultural operations.

media:content.media:title: A Tough Day in the Field
media:content.media:description: A challenging day of farm work in the field, showing difficult conditions, problem-solving, and the realities of agricultural operations.

item.title: Muddy Day in the Field
item.description: A wet and muddy day of farm work showing challenging field conditions, equipment use, and the realities of working in tough weather.

media:content.media:title: Muddy Day in the Field
media:content.media:description: A wet and muddy day of farm work showing challenging field conditions, equipment use, and the realities of working in tough weather.

item.title: I’m the Boss on the Farm
item.description: A lighthearted farm moment highlighting leadership and decision-making during daily agricultural work and field operations.

media:content.media:title: I’m the Boss on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A lighthearted farm moment highlighting leadership and decision-making during daily agricultural work and field operations.

item.title: Field Cleanup Before Planting
item.description: Preparing farmland for planting by clearing debris, leveling soil, and readying equipment for the upcoming planting season.

media:content.media:title: Field Cleanup Before Planting
media:content.media:description: Preparing farmland for planting by clearing debris, leveling soil, and readying equipment for the upcoming planting season.

item.title: How Tractors Help Fight Wildfires
item.description: Explains how tractors create firebreaks, clear vegetation, and support crews to slow wildfire spread and protect farmland and communities.

media:content.media:title: How Tractors Help Fight Wildfires
media:content.media:description: Explains how tractors create firebreaks, clear vegetation, and support crews to slow wildfire spread and protect farmland and communities.

item.title: Preparing for the NYC Marathon
item.description: A journey toward the New York City Marathon, showing training progress, preparation, and the lead-up to race day.

media:content.media:title: Preparing for the NYC Marathon
media:content.media:description: A journey toward the New York City Marathon, showing training progress, preparation, and the lead-up to race day.

item.title: Playing with Tractors on the Farm
item.description: A fun, hands-on farm moment featuring tractors in action, showing equipment use, field work, and lighthearted agricultural activity.

media:content.media:title: Playing with Tractors on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A fun, hands-on farm moment featuring tractors in action, showing equipment use, field work, and lighthearted agricultural activity.
